title: Autopsy Assistant Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Autopsy Assistant Program Learning Outcomes

Program Learning Outcomes

1. Having sufficient backgraound in basic, clinical medical sciences and forensic medicine gives the ability to use theoretical and practical knowledge in forensic medicine

2. By choosing and applying the appropriate techniques and techniques, it is possible to identifiy problems that may be encountered in forensic midicine and autopsy procedures, and to gain the skill of postmortem sampling.

3. It provides the ability to supply the materials needed for autopsy and to practice the autopsy process with modern equipment in practice.

4. To have the ability to apply autopsy construction techniques and to be able to select the necessary equipment.

5. It provides the ability to perform an autopsy and reach conckusion in determining the cause of death at the end of the autopsy.

6. Accessing information and conducting the necessary resource search according to this purpose provides the ability to use information sources.

7. Taking responsibility by self-reliance provides the ability to work effectively in multiple complex events that require singular or disciplinary action.

8. Having the ability to express themselves adequately in Turkish and English provides self-confidence and ability to communicate in specific topics and to express in front of community.

9. Knowledge of the necessity to learn new things for life helps to gain the ability to renew itself with technology.

10. Having the consciousness of professşonalism and ethical rules is also approaching as a contribution to judical envy to achieve results that will constitute equitable trust.
